title: RecalibrationGateV1
description: Runtime gate artifact for enabling recalibration (M26). This is the only authority that allows runtime recalibration to be applied. Must be explicitly provided as a file artifact (no environment variables or defaults).

enabled.description: Whether recalibration is enabled (false = no change to runtime behavior)

parametersRef.description: Path or hash reference to RecalibrationParametersV1 artifact (required if enabled=true)

scope.description: Which heads to apply recalibration to: outcome (W/D/L), policy (move probabilities), or both

appliedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when gate was applied (set at runtime, not in artifact)

notes.description: Optional notes about why this gate is enabled (for audit/debugging)
